channel.title: flove making-of — routing questions
channel.description: New routing design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: How should routing.json be authored?
item.description:
• Community wiki — Anyone can edit. Democratic, fast updates, risk of vandalism. • Curator-only — Only curators can edit. Safe, slow, controlled. • Automated (AI) — AI generates/maintains routing. Fast, unpredictable, hard to audit. • Marc-only — Only Marc edits. Simplest, most control.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Marc-only
